Tweet by @omarsar0 (elvis)
Author bio: Building self-improving AI @dair_ai • Prev: Meta AI | PhD • Learn about AI Agents for FREE here: https://t.co/P5SA9u54xO
Text: For future-proof, build AI that's composable.

Regardless of what you use, all these should be composable, iterative, and customizable:

- LLMs
- Evals
- Automations
- MCP/CLI tools
- Skills/Memory/Context
- Agent Harness (Codex, CC, Pi,...)

The compounding effects are insane.
